case_title: FEINBAUM ROBERT DBA FEINBAUM ASSOCIATES VS E.H WHITE AND CO CARE OF THOMAS GUNDLACH

docket_entries.description: FRAME, THE $21 DOLLARS CHECK HAS TO BE ENTERED. IF ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT IS TO BE ISSUED LATER, DO SO WITH NO FEE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FEINBAUM ROBERT DBA FEINBAUM ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT E.H WHITE AND CO CARE OF THOMAS GUNDLACH $1,672.97 PRINCIPAL, $1,671.79 INTEREST, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,384.76, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 714896. JUDGMENT ENTERED 4/3/92. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT RENEWED ON APRIL 2, 2002. COSTS AFTER JUDGMENT OF $40 & INTEREST OF $1671.79 SUBMITTED IN MEMO OF COST IS INCLUDED IN RENEWED JUDGMENT.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 714896 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEINBAUM ROBERT DBA FEINBAUM ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT E.H WHITE AND CO CARE OF THOMAS GUNDLACH
PLTF'S $21 CHECK IS FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT AND ABSTRACT. ABSTRACT WAS NOT ISSUED DUE TO QUESTION OF DEBTOR'S NAME. TO ISSUE RENEWAL DUE TO TIME
